authority.department: Labour & ESI Department, Government of Odisha

overview: State-specific labour law requirements applicable to establishments operating in Odisha.

rules.title: Review Odisha Shops and Commercial Establishments Registration
rules.description: Determine whether registration under the Odisha Shops and Commercial Establishments legislation is required.

citations.reference: Odisha Shops and Commercial Establishments Act

rules.title: Maintain Statutory Registers and Employment Records
rules.description: Maintain statutory registers, employee records and prescribed notices under Odisha labour legislation.

rules.title: Display Statutory Notices
rules.description: Display statutory notices and employee information required under applicable Odisha labour legislation.

rules.title: Review Working Hours, Overtime, Leave and Weekly Holidays
rules.description: Ensure compliance with Odisha provisions governing working hours, overtime, leave and weekly holidays.

citations.reference: Odisha Shops and Commercial Establishments Rules

rules.title: Review Professional Tax Applicability
rules.description: Verify whether Professional Tax obligations apply under laws currently in force in Odisha.

rules.title: Review Minimum Wage Notifications
rules.description: Ensure employee wages comply with the latest minimum wage notifications applicable in Odisha.

citations.reference: Government of Odisha Minimum Wage Notifications

rules.title: Monitor Odisha Labour Notifications
rules.description: Review labour department notifications, amendments, circulars and compliance updates issued by the Government of Odisha.

recommended.title: Annual Labour Compliance Audit
recommended.description: Conduct an annual audit covering statutory registrations, labour records, payroll compliance and inspection readiness.

recommended.title: Digital Compliance Calendar
recommended.description: Maintain a digital calendar for statutory filings, inspections, licence renewals and labour compliance due dates.
